BNPL at Sugbo Pork

We built BNPL to help households manage cash flow while still accessing quality, traceable food. Pricing is shown clearly before checkout confirmation.

1. Add products

Choose your cuts and delivery schedule.

2. Pick payment plan

Select cash, COD, or installment options during checkout.

3. Review schedule

See due now, due later, and total before placing order.

Purpose-first finance: Financing should reduce stress, not create it. Keep disclosures simple, visible, and upfront.

Start shopping
